text: @HonOscarSudi Build Kenya industries and it will ubsolve all its youth, giving them livelihood and pensions at old age. 25k siku moja ama mshahara for the rest of our careers?...Ubaya ni mnafikiriaga kama mende, kukula tu! #RutoMustGo
label: offensive
rationale: 'mnafikiriaga kama mende, kukula tu' - 'you think like cockroaches, just eating' is crude personal insult directed at politicians (addressee is @HonOscarSudi and implied political class), not a collective ethnic group; 'mende' here is a contempt metaphor for individuals, not an ethnic-targeting dehumanisation.

text: @LabanMbunya So 45 days consultations ilikua ya nini? Hehehe.sema kimeumana!! But what options does he have anyway? it is either Kalonzo or kalonzo. Delaying it to even July will not change anything
label: neither
rationale: 'kimeumana' used as political commentary on opposition coalition manoeuvring, no ethnic target or harmful intent.

text: @ngoya_derrek He can recreate 41 vs 1
label: neither
rationale: '41 vs 1' is a historically loaded frame but used here as a bare electoral-arithmetic observation about coalition-building potential, no contempt or attack on a group.

text: @gabrieloguda Remember they will not be in the Ballot come 2027 so 41 against 1 is not mathing. We will pour our votes to the the United opposition candidate who @edwinsifuna will be the DP. Mtaona vumbi
label: neither
rationale: '41 against 1' referenced as an electoral-math argument being refuted; 'mtaona vumbi' is ordinary political bravado, no ethnic group attacked.

text: Toto na Tetesi: Nyoka wahangaisha wachezaji kombe la dunia. #MikikiMikiki @totoarege
label: neither
rationale: 'nyoka' used literally in a football/World Cup context ('snakes disturb players'), no ethnic target.

text: @_KithureKindiki kimeumana
label: neither
rationale: Single-word political exclamation directed at a named politician; no ethnic group targeted.

text: Kimeumana ile mbaya
label: neither
rationale: 'kimeumana ile mbaya' - emphatic expression that things have escalated badly, standalone political commentary with no target group.

text: RT @LabanMbunya: SEMA KIMEUMANA! The United Opposition and Linda Mwananchi seem happy to create and fuel animosity at every turn by endorsing Edwin Sifuna. Rigathi Gachagua appears to have set aside his own presidential ambitions to back Fred Matiang'i. Meanwhile Kalonzo and Wamalwa have been pushed aside, though perhaps not permanently. The public disagreement between George Natembeya and Eugene Wamalwa paints a bad picture for the opposition but hands the government a big advantage. Natembeya is ready to mount a full force campaign alongside the energetic Linda Mwananchi movement. Eugene Wamalwa clearly feels sidelined in the current arrangement, which seems to favour only Fred Matiang'i, Edwin Sifuna and Kalonzo Musyoka as the main presidential contenders. Justin Muturi also looks to have fallen out with Rigathi Gachagua. He is increasingly becoming ungovernable within this United Opposition setup and could soon show them the real birds of Kang'ethe. The ticket might end up with Edwin Sifuna versus Ruto!
label: neither
rationale: Political analysis of opposition coalition dynamics; 'kimeumana' used as commentary opener, no ethnic group attacked.

text: 'Ruto, You Joined Raila in 2007 and Mobilised 41 Against 1,' Gachagua Claims
label: neither
rationale: Journalistic headline quoting Gachagua's claim about Ruto's 2007 role; reporting historical allegation, not expressing ethnic contempt.

text: Just like Gachagua gave William Ruto Tutam by coiling wantam,Muturi's support for Kalonzo Musyoka is another way of giving William Ruto a punching bag for 2027 presidential campaign. William Ruto must find someone with madoadoa to shine. William Ruto has nothing on Edwin Watenya Sifuna.
label: neither
rationale: 'madoadoa' used here as political slang for a useful antagonist/foil in Ruto's campaign strategy, not directing ethnic-removal framing at a community.

text: Junet: I thought Huyu Sifuna Mambo yake tulikua tunamalizia pale Bunge Kumbe Tunamjenga Arati: Jana Alivuruga Zaidii kwa bedroom ....Nilijaribu Goons lakini wapi Matiangi :Mimi sioni Shida kwa Sifuna, SI ata alinisifu? Junet: Simba, Ama Tufukuze Oburu ODM Tueke Sifuna party leader? Arati:Mamuuúuuuuuuu.. Matiangi: Abujubuju.......☺️
label: neither
rationale: Satirical fictional dialogue among named politicians about ODM internal politics; 'tufukuze' targets a named individual (Oburu) for party removal, not an ethnic group.

text: 𝐎𝐭𝐡𝐞𝐫 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐬 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐟𝐢𝐚. 𝐈𝐧 𝐊𝐞𝐧𝐲𝐚, 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐦𝐚𝐟𝐢𝐚 𝐡𝐚𝐯𝐞 𝐚 𝐜𝐨𝐮𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐲. In October 2013, a man called Bogonko Bosire disappeared...
label: neither
rationale: Long investigative narrative documenting enforced disappearances and state-linked killings of whistleblowers; criticism targets state impunity and named officials, no ethnic group attacked.

text: Musalia Mudavadi has Never hustled in his political life...
label: neither
rationale: 'Madimoni' quoted as Uhuru's own famous phrase in its historical context; the post is political biography and criticism of Mudavadi as an individual, no ethnic community attacked.

text: Sema kimeumana 😂😂😂 #WANTAM #RUTOMUSTGO
label: neither
rationale: Political exclamation with anti-Ruto hashtag; 'kimeumana' as commentary with no ethnic target.

text: People who have been arguing that Kibaki caused 2007 should follow this guy. We, who lived through 2007 with the skin of our teeth, shouldn't argue with kids who were still eating mashed pumpkin when "madoa doa" was the song
label: neither
rationale: 'madoa doa' quoted to describe the historical period of incitement, not to express it; author's stance is clearly reflective and condemning of 2007 violence.

text: This is something I've been consistently telling Kenyans. Some people labelled me a Fool. Truth be told, Edwin Sifuna and Babu Owino will never stick together. This a competition of Egos. None amongst them wants to be led by the other. Caleb Amisi is another gentleman to watch.. infact he stopped attending the Linda Mwananchi rallies. The split is very very imminent. Na huku Western Kenya Papa Wa Roma is fully back on the ground. Watajua Hawajui!
label: neither
rationale: 'watajua hawajui' directed at named political opponents in an opposition-split analysis, not at an ethnic community; no ethnic target identifiable.

text: @BoboWamboiKuria Hii nayo mkijaribu 41 vs 1 will be a reality ni hayo kwa sasa
label: neither
rationale: '41 vs 1' invoked as a political warning about coalition arithmetic, not as ethnic contempt against the implied single community.

text: NA Speaker Moses Wetangula has issued a 48-hour demand to Standard Group over a front-page story titled Broad-based family, calling it false and defamatory Through his lawyers, Wetangula wants the publication withdrawn, an apology published on the front page, the online story pulled down, and compensation negotiations to begin, failing which he says he will sue Standard wamepatikana. Watajua hawajui
label: neither
rationale: 'watajua hawajui' aimed at Standard Group in a legal-dispute context; no ethnic target, used as political/institutional bravado.

text: Edwin Sifuna has been given the big seat while George Natembeya and Godfrey Osotsi are just normal guys. Sema kimeumana pale Linda Mwananchi
label: neither
rationale: Opposition coalition commentary; 'kimeumana' signals internal disarray with no ethnic group targeted.

text: TODAY I STAND IN SOLIDARITY WITH WAKILI DIANA GICHENGO AND @TISAKenya...
label: offensive
rationale: 'fumigants which should be used to fumigate the cockroaches occupying Kipchumba Murkomen's empty brain' - pest-control dehumanisation aimed at a named individual politician, not an ethnic group; degrading personal insult.

text: @Kenyans Kenya politicians are rotten human beings
label: offensive
rationale: 'rotten human beings' is a generic abusive insult aimed at politicians as a professional class, not any ethnic or protected group.

text: @pksalasya Ngahu atachizi juu ya Sifuna. Bado haamini sifuna anapendwa Bure. This Luhyas na wivu za takataka
label: hate
rationale: 'This Luhyas na wivu za takataka' collectively attributes base jealousy ('wivu za takataka' - worthless/garbage jealousy) to the Luhya community as a whole - NCIC ethnic contempt by collective negative-characteristic attribution.

text: Government Ni bloggers imerelease ama ni nini? Kuna kiwave kiawatu wajinga Sana watutam wengine wanajiita silent majority,wengine wanaita wakikuyu tribalist hii ni Ile pesa ya maandamano ya goons inaongea deal with them traitors!
label: neither
rationale: 'wakikuyu tribalist' references an accusation being made by others online, not the author attributing tribalism collectively to Kikuyu; the post criticises pro-government online astroturfing with no sustained ethnic contempt.

text: @WhiteHouse No country can be great if the Zionicans pass Section 219 in the NDAA and piss away our sovereignty.
label: neither
rationale: US-focused political comment about legislation and sovereignty; no Kenyan ethnic or protected group targeted.

text: KASONGO ANAMEZEA MATE MASHAMBA NA MALI YA WAKIKUYU GACHAGUA EXPOSES!!
label: neither
rationale: Headline-style claim that Kasongo covets land belonging to Kikuyu individuals (as property owners in a specific land case exposed by Gachagua); reads as a political land-grab allegation against a named individual, not collective contempt for the Kikuyu community, though the phrasing is borderline.
